name: My Class 1-A, Self-Indulgent, PROXY REQUIRED
description:
This is An Alternate Universe for My Hero Academia
All Characters have been Aged Up Appropriately To Follow Guidelines!!!

Aizawa and all U.A. Staff, a Majority of Pro-heroes, and a few Villains are Present in this Story, but essentially, it's about 22 different students, each with Unique Stories, Personalities, and Appearances.

I welcome all Criticism, Thoughts, Comments, and Concerns.

Originally, this was created because it was, as the title suggests, Self-Indulgent, which meant the purpose was merely an excuse for me to put all my OCs in one class.

Thank you to everyone willing to test it out and to those who are currently engaging with the Class.

I'm at a loss for words that you'd want to either write stories with them or just create silly scenarios. Either way, thank you, and I hope one of these characters might interest you.

If there's a specific character you like. I wouldn't mind making a Solo bot and a potential scenario.

Holy Crap, 500 Messages in a single day 😭😭😭 Thank you!!! Here's to hoping it continues to rise steadily. I will continue to update, tweak, and add tidbits of info to enrich the dynamic of Class 1-A.

Feel Free to add me on Discord: kinemorto

---

Updates:
7/31/25 - Introduction Message has been updated to include more Characters and hopefully more hooks to bring in attention.
Personality Section has been tweaked, and Tidbits of Information have been added to enrich Class 1-A
The Scenario Section has added Details regarding a certain Angel and the Class President
ADDED SAWAKI PAING, I FORGOT TO ADD HIM 😭😭😭Sorry to those who might've been confused by him.
> “Perfection isn’t something you’re born with; it’s something you carve out of those who are beneath you.”
Added a new Student to the Class. ENJOY! :)

8/1/25 - THANK YOU FOR 1.2K 😭😭😭 I didn't think my Bot would receive this much attention. I did share it to a couple of friends. But to see so many people engaged with my OC's is crazy!!! If you guys have any Ideas, I'm always willing to hear them!
Originally, Isabella was going to be planned as a 1k special, but my Autism got the better of me, and I got inspired because I wanted to create a, HEAVY QUOTATIONS "Main Villain" for the bot. Admittedly, I was inspired by the likes of Makima. But I'm curious to see what happens down the line for Ya'll! Feel free to add me on Discord and share your chats!

8/5/25 - Thank You for over 3k Chats. This is probably the part where the bot slowly starts Stagnating. But thank you to everyone who has been giving the bot this much attention.

Class 1-B

8/16/25 - Thank you for over 5k Chats. I do not have anything planned for the future. But I appreciate everyone who is actively engaging with the Class. I'm considering maybe a Dorm bot, or maybe putting this Class 1-A into a canon MHA Arc like U.S.J., maybe Sports Festival. But I don't know how I'd format and make that bot. Like usual, I accept any ideas.

8/26/25 - Thank you for 6k!

10/26/25
HOLY 10K??? WHO'S STILL USING MY BOT? I am beyond words that you've given this silly bot so much support over the course of these months!!! Thank you, everyone, seriously, from the bottom of my heart. The fact that there have been nearly 500 chats in total with my OC's is insa
creator: Kinemortophobia
